reviews.review_text: It's good 😊

I just returned from a wonderful trip with my two adult children and their families at this amazing complex! Each family had their own 2-bed apartment with all the amenities we needed. The lagoons were crystal clear and warm, and the spas were a treat. We also enjoyed the BBQ area, which we used a few times. The front reception was friendly and helpful; they replaced a broken kettle right away without any fuss. I would be happy to come back to this wonderful place again!

The pool and pool area is great, especially having one pool that is heated. The location is great, it is within a block of the beach and 15 min walk to the shops and restaurants at Broadbeach.
The room was very spacious, kitchen and bathrooms were nice and the beds were very comfortable. 
However there were a few maintenance issues that need addressing that made me not wish to stay at this resort again.
The lounge was FILTHY. Holes in the leather and so much food and crap between the cushions.
The oven did not work. Wouldn't even heat up.
The drawers in the freezer are broken, makes it hard to use.
The dryer is mounted upside down and the lint catcher wouldn't stay in, so it just fell to the ground. I didn't think we should use the dryer without it.
The curtains are filthy. They just need to be replaced.
Both showers leaked across the bathroom floor.
We stayed 8 nights and were meant to get a room service half way through, we did not get a room service at all. We got the 3rd degree when we asked for more toilet paper.
Would be nice if the place had face washers, when we asked about it we were told "that's not an Australian thing". We're Australian. It is a thing. Every other hotel gives face washers.
Great place. Reasonably priced. Close to the beach and a short walk to Surf Club for dinner

Beautiful place, great spot, very quiet, no traffic noise from inside the resort, highly recommend for families, the many pools are amazing, photos don't do them justice. Short walk tonthe beach, very safe running/walking area

My daughter had a liver transplant and i requested a very clean room and not only did i received a clean room it also was upgraded.
It's an amazing place to stay. My daughter absolutely loved the pool. 
Ive been there twice and I cannot wait to come stay again.

Nicely set up apartment ,  beautiful swimming pool , everything you need is close by . Only downside was the apartment building being built directly beside our apartment , which commenced each morning at 630am , I did read in the Ad that this was happening,  but didn't realize our apartment would be so close it , other than that we would stay again .

Overall we had a good stay. Cleanliness of our room didn't meet expectation the carpet might need some attention to help with the smell. TV didn't work for some reason and glass sliding doors didn't lock but it had security flyscreen door that worked. Design of windows are strange  with curtains sitting well under ceiling meaning big gaps for other rooms to see down into ours.

That actually facilities at Diamond beach were great. Bbq area very clean and pools seem to be looked after. Plenty of seating in bbq area also.

Location is great. We were able to park and not use car. Walking distance to everything needed and public transport is really cheap compared to Sydney.  Easy walk to tram that goes into surfers.

I'd stay again but would certainly ask for a different apartment but it could just be a lucky dip.
Such a great family friendly resort

The facilities and pools were fantastic, however, the rooms were not clean. There were coffee spills on the floor, flood crumbs along the edges of the kitchen floors. Previous guests belongings still in rooms (makeup and toiletry items). The balcony was covered in old bird poo and the floor very dirty. Happy to report the beds and linen were clean.

Negatives:
Room basic and not very clean - hairs on the floor, stains everywhere on cushions, sofa, curtains, shower drains blocked, blankets had food on them, kitchen had food marks on cupboards.
Has full kitchen but very limited cooking utensils.
Only 1 roll of toilet paper supplied for 2 bed unit and 5 nights.
Beds hard and not that comfortable.
Smoke alarm was faulty - went off a few times and at 1am - Reception staff said just leave it off.
Arrived late and self-check in details were unclear.

Positives:
Great location - handy to beach and Pacific Fair.
Nice pool facilities.

Great location.  Fantastic well maintained pool complex however apartment lack of cleanliness was a real let down.  Bathrooms unclean - drains so dirty we had to keep bathroom door shut to keep smell out. Floors dirty couldn't have bare feet inside  If you sat on the sofa with damp skin you would end up with grit all over your legs yuk   Don't mind a place that is a bit run down but absolutely no excuse for lack of cleanliness

We had a fantastic time here. This is definitely family friendly. The bbq/pool area is absolutely perfect for family’s. You can cook tea while supervising the kids.
Rooms were unfortunately not clean. I had to vacuum the carpets as there was hair all over them. Under one of the bathroom sinks there was long strands of black hair. In one of the bedrooms there was a macDonald’s box. The lounges had pop corn in them and under them aswell as dust and maccas toys. Verandahs need cleaning all glass doors need cleaning. Fans in rooms are only set on low and rooms are hot as there is only AC in the lounge room. Throw rug has stains on it. But if cleaning products had of been in the room I would have re cleaned it as I do like everything cleaned.
As I said we had a great time. The cleaners do need to do better.

Location was great, right near a tram/train station and Pacific Fair.
Apartments are tired but sufficient.
Pool and Bbq are is really good.
Location is amazing, right next to the beach and the mall. The pools are pretty clean and the rooms are nicely done up. Kitchens are perfectly sized and it is worth the price.
A repeat visit, worth coming back.

The accommodation was close to amenities such as Woolworths, Coles, fuel stations and Pacific Fair, the beach was a short walk away and lots of fun activities for the kids to do within 5-10 minute walking/driving distance.
The kids loved the pool and enjoyed the night swims after dinner.
The only issue we had was one of the rooms we had was on the 3rd floor with no lift/elevator will keep this in mind when booking a stay at breakfree in future! We will definitely be back thank you for a wonderful stay

Walk to beach, shops, restaurants and tram.   Location ..location... location.
Great swiming pool and spa area with Gas BBQ's for all to enjoy.
Many visits here and hopefully, many more in the future!

Spacious apartment with full kitchen and laundry. Modern fittings. No lift with only stairs and undercover carpark. Extensive pools including a toddler pool and several spa pools. No onsite bar or restaurant but a small kiosk with snacks and soft drinks. Reception open until 5pm and room serving is only offered after an extended stay. Very close to the beach and several cafes. 10min walk to large shopping Centres and supermarkets. Yes we would stay again as a family.

I regret to say that my stay at this apartment was extremely disappointing and uncomfortable. The beds were in a very poor condition. They were extremely squeaky to the point that moving a tiny amount during the night was loud enough to disturb the neighbours. This significantly impacted the quality of rest during my stay. Even more concerning, one of the beds appeared to have been badly repaired using duct tape (Which caused it to make tape ripping sounds when rested on). During the night, the bed frame failed and collapsed, causing major discomfort. This is completely unacceptable for paid accommodation and raises serious concerns about maintenance standards. I highly do not recommend this apartment because of these issues. A big waste of money >:(

We booked a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment at Diamond Beach Resort, paying around $500 per night, expecting a basic level of comfort and privacy.||On arrival, we were shocked to discover that the main bathroom in Apartment 143 was completely unusable — it had no door at all. The door had been entirely removed, making the bathroom impractical and unacceptable for a family or group stay.||We raised this issue immediately at reception, however no solution was offered. Our request to be moved to a different apartment was declined, despite the apartment clearly not meeting minimum expectations for a paid two-bathroom accommodation.||The second bathroom did have a door, but unfortunately the lock was broken, which again compromised privacy.||Charging premium rates for apartments that are outdated and fail basic functional requirements is not acceptable. A bathroom without a door is not a minor issue — it renders the apartment unsuitable for its advertised purpose.||This stay was extremely disappointing, and I would not recommend booking here unless management addresses these fundamental maintenance and quality issues.

Stayed in a 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment here - expectations were moderately low as other reviews to complain about cleanliness in the rooms but our room was pretty much spotless - however in some rooms there was a mouldy/ salty smell, but it is near the beach and pool area. The pool complex was large and had cooler and warmer pools to cater for all. The BBQ area was nice, and the underground parking was needed. Close to the beach and to Pacific Fair. Only negative is that one of our bathrooms was missing a door… 4/5.

Staff were friendly and accomodating. I definitely appreciate their hospitality.  Location to beach and the mall was convenient. I had small kids and elderly parents so was worried it might not suit them but worked out fine with a ground floor room. Pool area and playground was great. Our bedrooms got a bit warm as there was only aircon in the lounge so we blasted the air just to keep the rooms cool at night. Some of the crockery was chipped and pots scratched so probably needs replacing. Our balcony sliding door fell right off at first open, in the end we kept fitting it back on but could be a serious hazard around small kids. Overall for the price I paid our party still managed to relax and unwind so I would still consider staying here again.

Great location very close to the beach. Just out of main area so fairly quiet.
Rooms are variable.
Pools are great, clean and maintained.
Good bbq area and hot tub.
Amazing resort beautiful vibe!

Great location and family friendly, great staff! 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Pacific Mall is a 5-minute walk down the road and Surfers Paradise is a 15-minute walk away. 🛍️🏖️ #location #family #staff #mall #paradise #walk

My family and I arrived quite late (9pm) on Mon 28 October 2025. 5 adults (54, 52, 24, 18 & 16yr old). The onsite lockbox had the keys, map and instructions to the apartment. The after hours arrival process was pretty easy to follow.
We stayed in Unit 34. It was on the ground floor (had no stairs which I requested on the initial planning for this holiday) and we were VERY lucky to have been given this for our home to stay in for the week.
This place was an incredibly beautiful, well maintained, spacious, clean, and well equipped home with 3 large bdrms.
2 of the bedrooms had x2 single beds in each of them, ceiling fans, large open wardrobes. Both bedrooms inter-connected to the main bathroom.
Our room (the main bedroom) had a queen bed with its own ensuite bathroom. A big walk in wardrobe, big drawers, a ceiling fan & flatscreen TV fixed to the wall. The bed was amazing! Soft and sooooo comfy. Exactly what you want to come home to after a long day out site seeing and shopping.
There is a washing machine & dryer in the garage (which I used every day).
Free WIFI.  The kitchen, dining & lounge was a massive open plan space. Dining table & chairs for 10 people, Lounge had a massive L shaped leather couch and another huge flat-screen TV hung on the wall.
Kitchen was well equipped, fullsized fridge, oven, microwave, cutlery, pots & pans, kettle, toaster, kitchen utensils & heaps of cupboard space, we didn't need anything!
The pool at this place is one of the main drawer cards, my family swam everyday!  Check the Photos online, even better go there yourselves!
I did consider gate keeping but that wouldn't have been very helpful now would it fellow traveller's?? Overall, amazing time, just wish we had longer and more money!! Enjoy!!
Great location. Good amenities, especially the pool. Good secure, covered parking. Well kept and good value
Nice place for relaxing with family in beautiful leafy community in GC there is not much left like this sadly this kind of community’s stated to disappear and replaced by concrete high rises

We had a 2 bedroom apartment at Break free. Whilst fine for the 2 nights, I wouldn't be inclined to stay longer. Neither bathroom had exhaust fans and the bathroom ensuited to the main bedroom didn't have a door at all.

Ultimately though, all beds (the double and two singles) squeaking every time you rolled over made the experience once we'd like not to repeat anytime soon.

Very disappointed with the room. Not sure what room the people who left a great review were in but it definitely wasn’t ours. Worst I have stayed in. Aircon doesn’t work, fans are noisy. Curtains are filthy. Beds are hard. Bathrooms are dated and gross. Wouldn’t stay here again no matter the price.

Great location, close to beach, parks, cafe's, shops and public transport.
Great pools. Neat gardens. A little dated inside rooms, but altogether a great place to stay on the Gold Coast.

Great place to stay on a budget,  tram stop close by to get to surfers. Allocated underground parking which you need in 30plus degree weather. Low rise with central pools was exactly what we were looking for.  Choice of two swimming pools (one heated and one not), and two spa pools. Relaxing place to stay. Was close to 5 star
Extremely well located for families.  Close to public transport. Lovely pool and bbq area. Great stay.
Not that great for the money

Our first time at Breakfree Diamond beach will most definitely not be our last.
I brought my two young granddaughters with me and they loved the pools and the close proximity to shopping and Surfers Paradise. Also very close to all the public transport.
Our apartment was spotlessly clean with very comfortable beds and I was very impressed that we were supplied with enough toilet paper, washing powder and detergent for our 7 night stay.
The only thing that could have improved the kitchen facilities would be a few salad/fruit bowls.
The reception staff couldn't do enough for us. They booked our theme park tickets and we got a 5% discount which was awesome.
It is also close to the park, the beach and the Kurrawa Surf Club.
10 out of 10 for us!!! Thank you!

We have frequented the Diamond Breakfree Resort because our kids love the pool and spa and it is also close to the beach and shops. It's very relaxing and the parking included with the stay makes it easy and stressfree.
Best place to stay on the Goldcoast

Our family had an excellent stay at Breakfree Diamond Beach. Initially we had some reservations after reading recent reviews but our 3 bedroom apartment was renovated, modern, spacious and well equipped. The grounds and pools were very attractive and great for children.  The reception staff were helpful and the location was a short walk to the beach and Pacific Fair. This is an older resort but we booked directly with the resort as apartments in their letting pool have been renovated and ours was lovely with expensive appliances. A very nice stay and recommended for families.

Apartment was a great size. Bed was comfortable. Pool area was fantastic and the proximity to the beach was great.
My only issue was the couches were pretty dirty.
Divine spas and pools lovely accomodation
Fantastic location and place to stay great rooms, pool, and BBQ area. Awesome  if you have kids.

Great accomodation & location
Staff extremely friendly & helpful.
Was perfect accommodation for a group on football trip.

We stayed here for 10 nights over the school holidays . The location was good but was quite disappointed with the apartment it was very tired and dated and did not reflect the pictures on the website. It was quite pricey for what it was too I guess being school holidays. There was also quite a lot of noise and escs from other construction works going on. The apartment was my meant to be 4 stars which we felt it was more like 3 stars .

Great little beach getaway. Close to parks for kids of all ages. Close to great places to eat. Pacific fair is just up the road. Most importantly, very close to broad beach, just be aware that the closest beach entrance is not patrolled. However, there is a patrolled beach not too far down the beach. The accommodation itself is well appointed with the rooms spacious and comfortable, but depending who you book through may differ from room to room. The pool area is large and has a couple of different areas so you dont feel like everyone is altogether.
Highly recommend a stay here, valve for money and location was perfect for the beach, mall and tram. Grounds were kept immaculate

A noisy resort with tired rooms that are poorly cleaned.  There is noise from the large next door building site and also the exhaust fans from a multi-story block next door.

The security doors on the balcony wouldn’t lock on our ground floor apartment. The doors and window seals all need replaced to reduce nose and improve security.  There were no bedside lamps.

The dishes/cutlery were dirty and the sofas had dark stains on the arms that need cleaned.

On the plus side the staff were great but they are working with a poor product.  There is secure onsite parking and you are a short walk to the park, beaches and the town centre.

With a bit of investment this could be a good resort.

Really enjoyed our stay wish it was longer. The complex was ideally located within walking distance to shopping centre and beach. The amenities were amazing and loved our one bedroom apartment with an outdoor space to relax and enjoy. Highly recommend and will definitely return.😊

Room was dated, bed was very soft, lumpy  and uncomfortable for 2 people (seemed very well used)
Bed constantly (moved rollers not locked)
Showers head broken and unable to adjust
Tiles in bed room made room
Loud, cold and uncomfortable
Limited furniture in bed room
Front entrance lock was taped open
Spa never seem to work in pool area
Noisey construction nearby
Road works outside was annoying
Nice area and easy access to shopping centre and transportation
You pay for what you get and we we're at the festival all day so .... didn't need much.. top notch security.

Staff friendly, its a shame the rooms are a very dirty and dated. The electronic lock on the complex entrance was broken and appeared to been like that for a long time, the pool area was nice and appeared to be only place they looked after. No room service have to go ask for towels and toilet paper etc Location is good right near beach - rooms need attention and cleaning properly, if they did that would be a great place
Everything about this place was excellent. I want to move in. Pool was excellent. We checked in late and it was all well explained. Location is fabulous.

I have stayed here a number of times because it is so nice. So kid friendly it’s kid heaven! The pools are amazing 2 giant pools one warm one colder + 2 spas (one cozy cave spa one open spa) and the kids pools are great. The whole resort feels like a tropical paradise! The best part for the kids is there is a playground for the kids right next to the pool and barbecue area! We always stay in apartment 95 and I would definitely recommend requesting this apartment. It’s clean and nicely renovated and has a great big balcony to sit and have some drinks in the afternoon as the sun goes down. It is only a short walk to the beach and short walk to Oasis (Main restaurants and shops) and a very short walk to pacific fair as well which is one of the best shopping centres I’ve ever been to. It is also a great walk down to Mermaid beach as well. Would 100% recommend staying here if you want the North Queensland tropical resort vibe but in the heart of Broadbeach!

We absolutely loved this resort and we enjoyed a fantastic family holiday there this past week with 10 adults and 6 children, staying in 5 of the 2 bedroom apartments. The apartments were clean and spacious and well appointed, the many pools had options for all temperatures and ages and the playground was a hit with the kids. The BBQ area has multiple BBQ's with a large seating area which we used every night. Location is perfect with just a 10 minute walk to Pacific Fair, 5 minutes to the beach and 10 minutes to The Oasis and restaurants. A massive thankyou to Christina in reception who helped with last minute changes to our bookings and was a friendly and welcoming face on arrival! Our family are already planning our next stay here!

Last time we stayed here was 2015. This stay was also great. We asked for deluxe room as did my Daughter as we were on holiday as a family together. They managed to get us as close as possible to each other, it worked out well. Great pools great tidy grounds with great staff, even though is much older accomdation we all felt it was perfect for what we needed.
Fantastic location and facilities!
Looking forward to our next stay already. This place has everything you need and more! Enjoy your stay everyone.
Could not recommend Diamond Beach Broadbeach enough, we had a very pleasant stay. Very good location close to all resturants, cafes, attractions.
Good location, great for kids of all ages. Rooms are clean and the pools are awesome!
Kristina's level of customer service was fabulous, our family really appreciated all the assistance she gave us.

Our family of 2 adults and 2 children stayed here for a week in early February 2025.

Location is great, clise to beach and short walk up to restaurantsand shops, we had a car which made getting to the theme parks easy.

The unit that we stayed in was slightly dated but was clean and tidy and what I expected for the price we paid.

The kids loved the pool area, there is plenty of seating, we didn't use the BBQ but saw that plenty of people did.

Staff were friendly and helpful

I would stay here again

This resort is great for families, easy to access and close to all that Broadbeach has to offer. Across the highway to Pacific Fair, only 5 minutes to plenty of restaurants in the main mall. Beach only 300m away. Huge playground nearby for kids.
Just great!

We had a fabulous trip. The room accommodation was perfect for us and the pool area and BBQ were next level. We will stay again. The only downside, if I'm being real picky, was that we needed to go to reception to ask for dishwasher powder and toilet paper every day so we ended up buying our own.

We loved our stay at Breakfree Diamond Beach. The room and pools were beautiful. We were poolside so just went through the balcony gate to the pool area. There are three pools, cold, warm, and a couple of warmer spas so you can find the perfect temperature.||They do a wonderful job keeping the gardens and pools clean. We had a fabulous time swimming every day. Proximity to the beach was great. ||The staff at reception were super helpful and friendly.|| The midstay room service changed the towels and sheets but didn’t seem to clean anything so the floor and bathroom felt a bit dirty by the end of our stay.||Overall we had a lovely stay and would go back.

Upon arrival we noticed that the apartment was quite dirty. There was laying used soap pieces in the showers, covered in hair from previous people. In addition to this, there was laying dead cockroaches in several rooms. ||||After our stay we were charged a big amount because they said the trash wasn’t taken out upon departure and that there was a stain at the floor. That was not correct, as we had taken all our trash and the stain were there when we got there. They said that they had picture proof they could send us, but are not answering us when we asked to see them. It’s been two weeks now, and we haven’t heard anything yet. ||||This is not a sustainable way do run a business. I would think twice before booking with them.

Cockroaches everywhere, both dead and alive. There were soap pieces in the shower and hair from former tenants. There were also stains on the sofa and generally dirty. They also charged us a fee for poor cleaning. They said they had picture proof, but when we requested to see the pictures, they never answered.
Nothing short of fantastic.  We love the resort and wouldn't stay anywhere else on the Gold Coast.

Awesome only a couple of things in the room but over all a great quiet stay and excellent for my mum as she has just recently had cancer treatment so she wasn't able to walk to far or use to many  steps. The kids had so much fun at the pool and the BBQ area is great. Close to everything walking is great.

Was surprised when I arrived early at the resort that basically we were told room not ready come back at 2 by the way only 1 car space so try find an unlimited park out on street as only 1 car space even though we’d booked a 3 bedroom apartment. With no visitor or spare spaces. Housekeeping needs to do a better job given we reported mould on ceiling of main bedroom and on the bottom of blinds in lounge. The kitchen wasn’t set up for the people in room with insufficient plates cups saucepans! When I asked reception all they could say was with all the families things move between rooms. As there was no bar or restaurant welcome drinks were limited to a can of soft drink… didn’t feel like a gold member! But having said all of the above now I’ve stayed there I know what to expect and I’d do things differently like make sure I bought supplies like salt pepper etc with me as well as booked differently so we grandparents had our own space away from children and grandchildren. The resort was ample for kids and gran kids and grounds well maintained and location wise just far enough out of Gold Coast and Coolangatta to be out of rat race.|Well located to PAC Fair and sufficient restaurants cafes given no onsite restaurant.

We had an exceptional experience with Kristina Moschelloa and the BreakFree Diamond Beach Reservations Team! From the moment we reached out, they went above and beyond to try accommodate our needs as a family with a child with a disability and an assistance dog. Their understanding and willingness to help were truly remarkable.

We stayed to spend time with family visiting from Victoria which led us to pick up our keys and park our car then went straight to catch up. First mistake as by the time we realised our room was not fit to stay in it was too late reception was closed. The smell was overwhelming and there were marks on the blankets and the side of the bed that hadn’t been cleaned. The shower and washing machine were mouldy. I understand it’s an older venue and as such I expected some chipped grout and some stains in the carpets etc but this was beyond gross. We had to go to a supermarket to pick up enough supplies to clean the place ourselves to make it suitable to sleep in. Happy to share the photos I took for anyone that actually cares. Would never go back or recommend even to an enemy.

the apartment we got had not been cleaned properly after schoolies, large stains on the floor that stunk like off milk,  the blankets on the bed had not been washed or changed either. the only positive was the location of the hotel and the pools.
Always a great spot for a get a way, was visiting family from interstate

We have visited a few times for family holidays and have thoroughly enjoyed each experience. Our kids love the pools and spa. It is a fantastic location for families, close to the beach, parks and shops.
Good place to stay close to all amenities and shops
Huge resort with a great pool.
We stayed for 8 days. Really enjoyed the location - the nearby beach was fantastic. Facilities and staff were both great. Would definitely stay there again.

Great location. But the photos on website don’t reflect what the rooms are really like, so don’t be fooled by that. Although the rooms were a great size for 3 teenagers and 2 adults..the state of the rooms when we arrived wasn’t ideal…dirty sheets, dirty dishes in cupboard and dirty cutlery. When reception was notified they said they would sort, but didn’t, so we had to clean the sheets and dishes ourselves, we had to buy our own toilet paper and dishwashing liquid as wasn’t enough provided  The shower wasn’t clean, as had soap scum everywhere, looked like it hadn’t been cleaned in a few weeks, had to wash and dry our own towels daily, as they wouldn’t provide anymore.
BUT the pool and bbq area was 2nd to none, the teenagers loved swimming a few times a day.

Absolutely loved our stay. Massive apartments, wonderful staff. Heated and unheated pools open til 10pm, spa, bbq facilities. Wonderful for families. We stayed here with a lot of our wedding guests and were blown away. Almost didn't need to leave to have the best holiday.

The rooms had more than enough room for a large family, were clean and accessable.
There was no service to replenish garbage bags, or a garbage bin to take rubbish to, only a recycling and 10c can bin. When somebody unhelpfully parked in our space we were told to park on the street which is unacceptable with 3 young children <5 years old and this was not resolved.

A little tired with little Reno would be amazing right near beach and jsut a walk down road to surf club and pubs big pool wasn’t pleased someone had extras in the hotel for a kids birthday sorry that we’re not staying at the resort. Rooms were massive great for families seats around pool super comfy caretakers did well fighting the funny bush turkeys haha
We have stayed here twice now and both times have been great. Excellent location and great rooms although could be a little cleaner but overall we had a great time & staff are really helpful
Great spot and great friendly staff 👍

Great Rooms, pools, facilities, and atmosphere.
Kid friendly and beautifuly looked after floral and forna.
Thankyou for the honesty posting my very expensive  Sunglasses back to me and my sons headphones..

Great location, nice pool. Great in room facilities ability to cook your own food is a great thing in the current economic environment. I highly recommend this resort for any young families that are planning a getaway. Local restaurants are lovely and I short walk to Broadbeach.
Amazing service with great rooms and location

Have stayed here many times. Latest stay lacked a little bit of love around the resort.
Garden up keep has declined since we last stayed and our room wasn’t very clean when we arrived.

Every holiday at Gold Coast we book at this resort! Loved the place over tye years, but it's going backwards a bit. The amenities are still great and neat, but the units are getting old, dirty and aren't very well looked after. We enjoyed our stay, but come on management..... we pay hefty $$$ per night, please start looking after the units. We had to do a proper clean when we arrived as it was terribly dirty and mouldy!!

Nice resort.
Located in a good position, the resort look really nice.
Clean, comfortable and quiet apartments are accessible to all class of people or visitors.
Good for family and friends.
Wi-Fi were not dependable.
The bed 🛏️ was on wheels and the floor was  tiled, therefore, when entering into bed, the bed moved. Sometimes you found yourself next to the window or next to the cupboard when waking up in the morning. New experience.
That’s the reason I gave it 4 stars 🌟
Recommended!

DO NOT STAY HERE!!! We just checked in and the pictures on their website do not even come close to what the rooms actually look like. We booked a deluxe two bedroom for two weeks and it is filthy and smells horrible. The front desk offered to have them clean it again tomorrow however if it was supposed to be clean today I don’t think that will help anything. The dishes/pots and pans were used and put back in the cabinets/drawers. Save yourself a vacation where you will be cleaning up others messes. Disgusting.

Great location and great staff. Our unit was away from the pools and so so quiet. Loved it!! Everything we needed for our holiday. Loved being close to the oasis shopping centre and so so close to the beach too.|One block from the Broadbeach South tram stop so very easy to travel north or south on the coast.

Perfect place for my extended family to stay for a 5 day holiday.  We booked a 4 bedroom apartment and it was located on the 3rd floor.  The apartment was clean, well furnished and was really well laid out with all the kitchen supplies that you could ever need.  It had ample balcony space off each bedroom so each person could find their own space to relax away from everyone else.  The kids loved the pool / spa.
The managing company, especially the lady who handed us our keys and took my enquires when I rang were nothing but helpful and lovely.

Edit after their reply:
Such a generic response from {Brand}, for me the {guest}🙄 really has just shown the lack of customer care here. I am very disappointed. I feel our issue with the HEALTH AND SAFETY will fall on deaf ears! I have dropped another star!

May 2024
I want to start with all the positives here as when we were looking for accommodation, negatives were listed first and it put me off straight away, and I think this resort is a lovely place to stay.

We got a great poolside room, near the cold pool which was great as it wasn’t as noisy.
Great facilities with having the cold, heated, spa and BBQ area, with small playground. Our youngest spent every single day of our 8 day stay in the pool, sometimes twice a day.

All lit up at night time, waterfall turns off at 10pm.

The room itself was pretty good, spacious, with two bathrooms, Pretty much anything we needed was there.

The grounds are pretty, the planting is dense, and they were re mulching the entire place during our stay and it looked great.

Key card access into the grounds was nice security.

Undercover parking onsite and free wifi.
Very family friendly.

Cons:
Our biggest and most serious negative, we had a pretty major housekeeping issue and Im not sure if I really want to mention the details or share pics, we didn’t want to kick up a big stink considering it was our first day and the kids were feeding off our moods, but I was disappointed and wish I had as just 'that's no-good, I'm sorry about that',  really doesn’t cut it, considering had I injured myself (which was very close), our whole trip would have been different. It was a MAJOR health and safety risk. What we found was completely unacceptable and made us wonder if all checks and cleaning had been done.

The room was somewhat tired, alittle bit of maintenance required, to be expected for this age.

The master shower screen needs some TLC, the seals at the bottom were green, and every shower no matter how you positioned the head outside the shower was soaked, and when you only have 1 bathmat it got frustrating. Plus the tiles are very slippery.
Didn’t love that there were items left in areas that belonged to what I can guess is the unit/timeshare owner, some were in a locked cupboard and I suggest moving it all to that space.
Please replace clock batteries.

Overall we did have a great stay, the staff all friendly, the grounds are maintained well and they have staff cleaning the pools and bbq area each morning. There was abit of noise in the evenings, but to be expected as I think they were fully booked. We did have a pool gate that backed onto our bedroom that got opened and slammed closed many times each night, I would suggest seeing if you can adapt this to close quietly. Good location, 2min walk to mermaid beach (amazing sunrise) and a quick drive to local restaurants and pacific fair.

We stayed last November in Unit 15, a 1 bedroom unit that reception took great pride in telling us that the bathroom had been refurbished. Great, except the floor had been raised and the doors did not meet the floor, in fact a good 2 inch gap leaving nothing to the imagination when one's partner is in the toilet. Disgusting and unacceptable.
Other issues were the oven and rangehood were from the stone age. It was rusty. Didn't use that our whole stay!! The fridge was on a terrible lean that everything just rolled. Carpets and furniture filthy dirty, curtains couldn't be pulled because many bits broken and the track was terrible, let alone also filthy.
Service was done 3 days into our stay of 10 nights. To top it off, the place is now at least a third Owner occupied and many of these have dogs, some people with three!! You're actually made to feel like you shouldn't be there and you're invading their territory. We paid $170 a night and that is overpriced for what we got.
I have stayed at Diamond Beach 6 monthly since 2014 barring COVID times.
November was our first time back since COVID stopped travel and needless to say we will never be back again.
So disappointed and to finish off, this "resort" is no longer a resort. Such a shame.

Travel agent arranged our 3 generation family holiday, we stayed in 3 units. We stayed one week in April 2024.
I was disappointed from the cons below.

My unit has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, laundry kitchen etc.
.,..
Unit has been repainted,  .
More than 100 units,  probably owned by an investor and maintenance  overlooked. .??? by body corporate
Renting is  thru accord group.
....
Pros, ,...good location near the beach , reasonable price. .
......
Cons .. ..  Unit smelt of smoke, dirty ceiling vent, both showers had mold, toilet seats rims were urine stained, clothes washer control knobs missing, bed quite smelled and needed washing, sitting room ranch slider lock needed repair, sink leaked.

We spent 10 nights here. What an amazing resort. We had a 1 bedroom apartment. A very comfortable QS bed, large balcony, 2 tvs. Resort has 2 wonderful pools. 1 heated. Swim areas for young children, play areas. Plenty of sun loungers. Great bbq areas. The staff were without fault. Super friendly and professional. The resort is in the best location. Easy walk to Pacific Fair, The Oasis, Coles, Woolworts, BWS, light rail, bus, Draculas, Surf Club, beach. We will be back.
Great family resort with heated pool and within walking distance to the beach, Pacific Fair, the Tram and Broadbeach Central. Loved it so much we live here now!
Excellent resort and family friendly.
Great place for a family holiday with the kids
Great place for the family. Kids had a blast. The awesome staff even checked us in a little early.
Great for a family getaway. Great location close to the beach or if you dont like sand (like me) laze by the huge pool complete with warm spa.

It’s a good place walking distance to everything and chlose to
Public transport and bus to Themparks

No schoolies, nice and quiet!
A great pool and spa.

What a mint spot .
Heated outdoor pool and spa.  Flash rooms . Woohoo

Pros:  Family friendly, great pools, spacious apartments and fantastic location with walking distance to beach, parks, mall and dining.

Cons:  Carpets need a good deep clean along with curtains to get the mould off.  We were a family of 5 staying and the 5th bed was a fold out single, it was horrible and we asked for another mattress which we got and it made no difference you could feel the metal bars underneath.  I suspect they had heard this story before as she had a couple of solutions straight off the bat for us of another mattress or using blankets to pad the bars.  Paying what we did we shouldn't have to play round with a bed so much, they need to look at this.

Also disappointed to read the review responses are very generic and not personalised responses to people's concerns.  Some work needs done around cleaning and comfort in this instance.

Otherwise we had a fantastic holiday and this is our second time visiting.
Can not recommend this place highly enough, great location, lovely rooms, a pool to keep the kids occupied for days. We always come here and will be back again and again.

Plumbing problems due to road works nearby.
Manager, Lillian,  lovely and accommodating after room mixup.

A lot of improvement is needed, rooms are dirty and have carpet stains, curtains and shower door broken, sliding doors didn't lock properly. Phone wasn't working, this was randomly repaired on our 3rd day without notice, I wasn't happy about a trades person entering the room without our knowledge (we weren't there at the time) mess and cut wires were left on the ground for my 2 year old daughter to find. A loud fan going on and off above our room kept me awake at m often at night. It's a shame as this place has the potential to be a  decent establishment.

3rd world out dates unit not a family unit lies told 1queen 2 was 2 single bed rooms paid for 2queen bed didn't say anything till we got there. Lied room a mile away 3, stories up pushed a 3 months and pram up every day ridiculous ask to fit issue said no.

Such a lovely location, great staff, however was really disappointed to see the no smoking sign and then have smoke blow into our unit from another room. It was so overwhelming I tried to go out to the pool to get away from it but it just seemed to follow me. This happened a few times during our stay, I have a chronic lung condition so this was not helpful. The staff did not seem to care that the lady was smoking as they didn’t seem to ask her to stop. Otherwise amazing pool area and bbq area. Will be back !
